arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'weigh up eye-catching move' for teenage star
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly closely monitor Juventus attacker Kenan Yildiz ahead of next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to play 500th match at Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: We’ve played 348 league games at Emirates Stadium (69.7% of the total) winning 230, drawing 72 and losing the other 46. Wednesday’s meeting with Manchester United will be a landmark game for the club, as we play our 500th competitive men’s first-team match at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Manchester United likelier to move for player at €70m+bonuses – Much more attractive deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are in the picture to sign Sporting’s Viktor Gyökeres. Recent claims in the UK stated the Red Devils had already made contact for the striker, but this was dismissed by A Bola on Tuesday. Wednesday’s edition of A Bola relays that and then states Manchester United are one of the ‘most interested’ parties. The post Manchester United likelier to move for player at €70m+bonuses – Much more attractive deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player’s agent drama key in transfer saga – Gunners exit overshadowed
arts.sum: Arsenal and Gabriel Jesus are open to parting ways in the January transfer window if a deal is in ‘the interests of all parties’. That’s according to UOL, who report that Jesus will be entering the window ‘without official representation’ after parting ways with his previous agent. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: There is an intriguing clash in North London tonight, as Arsenal host Manchester United in the Premier League. Since the international break Arsenal have found their groove with three resounding wins in quick succession. There is uncertainty over the availability of five Arsenal players, however, with Mikel Arteta remaining coy on their chances of featuring. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops Amad Diallo contract update after major Erik ten Hag claim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim delivers a contract update on young Man Utd star Amad Diallo.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand heals rift with Arsenal star after damning 'he can't run' blast
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star Rio Ferdinand revisited his old comments about Jorginho when he spoke to the Arsenal and Italy midfielder on a new podcast episode

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United honeymoon period backed to come to an abrupt end at Arsenal
arts.sum: Amorim is unbeaten in his first three games as United manager and now travels to North London to take on Arsenal

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains how Bukayo Saka is seeking to emulate his childhood hero Cristiano Ronaldo amid the Gunners star's red-hot start to the campaign
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has explained how Bukayo Saka is seeking to emulate his childhood hero Cristiano Ronaldo amid the Arsenal star's incredible start to the campaign.

arts.ttl: What Jerry Jones has previously said about Arsenal owner Stan Kroenke amid Spurs takeover talks
arts.sum: There may be about to be a huge ownership shake-up at Tottenham Hotspur. Indeed, Amanda Staveley has been linked with Spurs for a little while...
